items.content_html: An Obsidian.md plugin that compiles a .md document from multiple documents linked using the ![[link_to_document]] syntax. The plugin recursively replaces these links with the content of the referenced documents to an infinite level of nesting.
items.title: filipaldi/text-composer: An Obsidian.md plugin that compiles a .md document from multiple documents linked using the ![[link_to_document]] syntax. The plugin recursively replaces these links with the content of the referenced documents to an infinite level of nesting.

items.content_html: Create and insert color palettes into your notes.
items.title: ALegendsTale/obsidian-color-palette: Create and insert color palettes into your notes.

items.content_html: This plugin automatically corrects words where the first two letters are capitalized and the rest are lower case.
items.title: Ummler/obsidian-auto-correct-capitals: This plugin automatically corrects words where the first two letters are capitalized and the rest are lower case.

items.content_html: A plugin for you to edit a bunch of daily notes in one page(inline), which works similar to Roam Research's default daily note view.

items.content_html: Obsidian.md plugin which allows you to use your notes to embed, create, and update gists for Github and Opengist. Light & dark theme support, create / update public & private gists either manually or with autosave.
items.title: Aetherinox/obsidian-gistr: Obsidian.md plugin which allows you to use your notes to embed, create, and update gists for Github and Opengist. Light & dark theme support, create / update public & private gists either manually or with autosave.

items.content_html: This is a plugin I made to printout plaintext files in Obsidian. It doesn't quite work the same as embeded files normally work but it filled my need to seeing a plaintext file from within obsidian.
items.title: KeithDEngr/ObsidianPrintoutPlaintext: This is a plugin I made to printout plaintext files in Obsidian. It doesn't quite work the same as embeded files normally work but it filled my need to seeing a plaintext file from within obsidian.

items.content_html: An Obsidian plugin for automated flashcard syncing from a folder in your vault to Anki. Pure Markdown syntax. No fuss.
